sourceMovie.title: ParaNorman
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto ParaNorman (2012) as a family theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The family and animation blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Ralph Breaks the Internet
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If ParaNorman clicked for you, Ralph Breaks the Internet (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and animation, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after ParaNorman?
faq.answer: Try Ralph Breaks the Internet, The Croods: A New Age, Hotel Transylvania: Transformania—each shares DNA with ParaNorman while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is ParaNorman?
faq.answer: ParaNorman (2012) is best described as Family, Animation, Adventure, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is ParaNorman worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this family lane.
